data: Enhance your animal companion's bite attack with acid.
Creates a small pocket of air around your head or an object.
Summon a duplicate of yourself from a parallel world to aid another
Sends a Tiny animal to a specific place.
Animal gains a new general purpose.
Triples carrying capacity of a creature.
Target gains a bonus on one initiative check.
Protect a creautre from incedental exposure to poison
Gives bonuses on Perception and ranged attacks.
Your voice becomes clear and pleasant, like a nightingale.
Enhance a weapon to deal bleed damage with its attack.
Change the color of yourself to match your surroundings and gain a bonus to Stealth.
A shortbow may double as a club, or a longbow as a quarterstaff.
Create a field of hot sand that creates difficult terrain and minor fire damage
Makes an animal come to you.
Summon an ally's weapon from a distance.
Animate the target undead's organs to lead you to its most recent controller or cause of undeath.
Change the color of your skin to something else.
Sprint or charge with amazing speed.
Reduces effects of intense sun exposure and environmental heat.
Ask a question to all birds within a mile of your location.
Compels opponents to attack you instead of your allies.
Animates a lantern that follows you.
Create an arrow of crackling electricity to harm your enemies or alert your allies.
Gain a +4 bonus on Survival and move full speed while tracking.
Hurl a tiny ball of negative energy to destroy plant life.
Stops poison from harming target for 1 hour/level.
Detects kinds of animals or plants.
Detects poison in one creature or object.
Detect radiation in the surrounding area.
Find others of the same faith.
Cause a sound to repeat itself
Exist comfortably in hot or cold regions.
Subject ignores adverse movement effects in difficult terrain.
You take no falling damage and move 60 ft./round while falling.
Arrows do damage as though one size category bigger.
Transform a rope-like object into a retracting grapple.
Assemble a sturdy raft and oars from driftwood, reeds, and other river debris.
Your recall and ability to process information improve.
Discover a temporary spring of fresh, flowing water
Hide a weapon within your own arm.
Target's weapons deal damage as if they were smaller.
Create three notes heard miles away.
Treat enemies as favored for 1 round/level.
Enhance a spear to be especially deadly against a certain creature type
Ignore divine focus components of your spells.
As alarm, but reacting only to invisible creatures.
Create a brushy beard of stiff iron to use as defense and a weapon.
Subject gets bonus on Acrobatics checks.
Allow creatures to stand watch without fatigue throughout the night.
Gain +10 on a monster Knowledge check.
Melee weapons damage as if one size bigger.
Target makes an Escape Artist check as an immediate action and gains a bonus on it.
Bonus to speed when charging and +2 CMB with overrun and bull rush.
Grants a +10-foot bonus to the range increment for any ranged weapon fired.
Obscure a target's tracks when fleeing from a pursuer.
One natural weapon of subject creature gets +1 on attack and damage rolls.

Learn the best way to travel overland
Subject cannot be tracked by scent.
Transform improvised weapons into actual weapons.
Locate places of power on your current plane
Prevent objects from rotting and spoiling
Bolster a creature's body against the harmful effects of spore and fungus.
Forecast the weather for the next 48 hours.
Transform improvised weapon into a masterwork simple or martial weapon.
Ignores 10 (or more) points of damage/attack from specified energy type.
Grants a weapon the returning special weapon quality.
+2 to saves vs diseases, drugs, and poison for 24 hours, discharge to reroll a failed save vs a disease, drug, or poison
Create a whip that passes through unworked stone
Transform your mouth into a ferocious maw, gain a bestial roar to demoralize your enemies.
Enchanted cape stiffens and can bear weight
As shield other, but affects the caster's animal companion or familiar.
Transmit a hidden message that you are a worshipper of Sarenrae to the target.

Target can roll twice and take the better result when making a saving throw against gaining minor conditions
Observe the night sky as if it were a clear and unobstructed night.

Grant the subject the rock throwing and rock catching abilities.
Enhance the target's wings, giving them greater fly speed and maneuverability.

Wield a javelin that sickens opponents when it strikes.
Gain a supernatural ability to detect tracks and other clues.
Give a +4 bonus on saves against effects which rely on negative emotions.
Create a rustling distraction to hide.
Move through crowds and urban settings with ease.

Gain a bonus to Knowledge based on the terrain you are in.
Protect a feathered creature from the cold for a day.

Tread unsteadily on air, with limitations.
Turns item up to 5 lbs./level into food.

Swap one summoned creature with another.
You gain some of the beneficial qualities of an animal.

Allow one or more creatures to ignore airborne effects and see through magical smoke and fog
Weapons are keen while you concentrate.
Grants +2 (or higher) enhancement to natural armor.

Magnify the target's ability to smell the presence of blood.
Gives caster the scent special ability.
Slashing weapon deals bleed damage to an opponent's head.

Shrink an animal or magical beast down to stone, ready to be enlarged again when summoned.

Know approximate distance from where you cast this spell.

Hides all traces of your campsite.
+20 on Perception checks to locate a target.
Share some of your class abilities with your animal companion.

2d6 damage to all creatures in area.

+2 AC against attacks of opportunity and increases speed.

Creatures bow before you as if you were divine.

This spell functions like silent image, except that the figment includes visual, auditory, olfactory, and thermal elements, and the spell is permanent. By concentrating, you can move the image within the limits of the range, but it is static while you are not concentrating.
Blinds creature with 200 hp or less.
As major image, plus triggered by event.
Illusory double can talk and cast spells.
As scrying, but faster and longer.
As song of discord, except creatures always attack others and get a bonus to Strength
As scripted hallucination, but it only appears when triggered.
Lets you see all things as they really are.
Summon a replica of the target that attempts to kill them
Changes appearance of group of creatures.
